name: addon-studio
description: Plugin Sankhya Addon Studio 2.0 com 21 skills focadas e 6 sub-agents (addon-reviewer, entity-architect, controller-designer, test-writer, troubleshooter, dbscript-builder). Skills: addon-studio (overview), init (setup docs/ADDON.md + @import no CLAUDE.md), entity, repository, controller, controller-advice, data-dictionary, database, dependency-injection, mapstruct, test, action-button, business-rule, before-load-listener, job, type-adapter, value, macros, encoding, build, retrofit. Compativel com Claude Code (skills + agents) e OpenAI Codex CLI (somente skills).
